commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Control UI approval resolution into the exec approval controller, treats stale resolve responses and resolved events as cleanup signals, refreshes pending exec/plugin approvals, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +143, Tests +190. Total +333 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main removes resolved queue entries without clearing active modal errors, and the decision handler surfaces every stale resolve failure as execApprovalError. I did not run the UI flow locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because I found no actionable patch defect, and the maintainer-labeled PR should proceed through normal review and merge gates.

target.title: Fix stale approval prompts in Control UI
target.body:
Summary:
- Fix stale Control UI approval prompts when an exec/plugin approval is resolved from another client, such as Discord.
- Treat stale resolve responses as terminal UI cleanup signals: `APPROVAL_ALREADY_RESOLVED`, `APPROVAL_NOT_FOUND`, and `unknown or expired approval id` now dismiss the prompt and refresh pending approvals.
- Clear active prompt errors on resolved events, preserve in-flight local resolve state, and add expiry cleanup for approvals recovered from list refresh.

Bug summary:
A web approval modal could remain open after the same approval was resolved elsewhere. Acting on that stale modal could leave the prompt showing an error instead of dismissing it.

Root cause:
On main, `exec.approval.resolved` only removed the queue item and did not clear active modal error state. The approve/deny handler also treated all resolve errors as modal errors, so backend stale-approval responses stayed visible instead of clearing the stale prompt.

Fix summary:
The approval controller now owns resolve cleanup. Success removes the active prompt. Stale backend errors remove it, refresh `exec.approval.list` and `plugin.approval.list`, and schedule expiry cleanup for refreshed items. Resolved events remove the matching prompt and clear its active error without clearing a separate local resolve that may still be in flight.

Bug existed on main:
Yes. The worktree started from `origin/main` and the added regression failed before the fix. The rebased parent still had the same behavior: `removeResolvedApprovalRequest` only removed from `execApprovalQueue`, and `handleExecApprovalDecision` caught every resolve error as `execApprovalError`.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` passed, 79 tests.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` passed: no accepted/actionable findings.
- Testbox-through-Crabbox `tbx_01ksebnk487fwwn8qvs07e3xfv`: `pnpm check:changed` passed before rebase.
- Testbox-through-Crabbox `tbx_01ksebxy0xd1vs1p9x4rjjyfe9`: `pnpm check:changed` passed after rebase.

Behavior addressed: stale Control UI exec/plugin approval modals after external resolution.
Real environment tested: local Vitest in the OpenClaw worktree plus Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=6 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 OPENCLAW_TESTBOX_REMOTE_RUN=1 pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed with 79 tests; Testbox `tbx_01ksebxy0xd1vs1p9x4rjjyfe9` exited 0.
Observed result after fix: stale resolve success/errors remove the modal, external resolved events clear active prompt errors, and refreshed pending approvals expire from the UI.
What was not tested: a live Discord-to-Control-UI manual approval flow was not run.
target.author: jesse-merhi
